name: Butternut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease and flour three 9-inch cake pans with butter.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs one at a time, adding well after each addition. Beat in baking soda and salt mixed into buttermilk until foamy.
4. Alternately add flour mixture to the egg mixture. Stir in butternut flavoring.
5. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until done.
7. Remove from oven and let cool.
8. Spread cream cheese over cooled cake, then sprinkle with powdered sugar and chopped nuts.
